title: Incorrect results for reverse for loop

features.name: for loop with reverse array indexing and same-loop assignment
features.description: Code should include a for loop in a combinational always block where an array element is assigned using reverse indexing (arr[row-1-i]) while also being assigned in the same loop iteration

features.name: 2D unpacked array in for loop with reverse access
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array where one array is assigned from another array using reverse indexing within a for loop

features.name: same variable read and written with different indices in loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop where the same array variable is both written (arr[i] = ...) and read (... = arr[row-1-i]) in the same iteration
